description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a sprawling layout, featuring multiple interconnected sections and a mix of gable and flat roof elements. The front facade includes a covered porch, a driveway leading to a garage, and a manicured lawn bordered by a low fence. The rear of the property boasts a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio area, and several mature trees providing shade and privacy. Windows are generously distributed across all sides, with a combination of large, symmetrical front-facing windows and more varied arrangements on the sides and rear. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with contrasting dark roofing and trim, giving the home a contemporary yet inviting appearance. The property is enclosed by a fence, and additional features include a small outbuilding and landscaped pathways.
description: A modern, expansive bungalow with a gable and flat roof, large windows, a front porch, garage, backyard pool, and mature trees, all enclosed by a fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, garage, and manicured front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the start of the backyard with visible pool and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio, mature trees, and a small outbuilding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, trees, and the side of the house with additional windows and pathways.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with varied side and rear groupings
